name: drupal-dkan-ai
description: Skills and slash commands for authoring custom Drupal modules that extend DKAN 4.x, the Drupal AI module (drupal/ai, ai_agents), and the MCP Server module (drupal/mcp_server), for contributing to DKAN core itself, and for the DCAT-US / open-data metadata specs DKAN implements. Auto-loading reference docs plus scaffolding commands.
